chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Seeking Rain (salat Al-istisqa)

text: 1500 - وَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ إِذَا اِسْتَسْقَى قَالَ « اَللَّهُمَّ اِسْقِ عِبَادَكَ وَ بَهَائِمَكَ وَ اُنْشُرْ رَحْمَتَكَ وَ أَحْيِ بِلاَدَكَ اَلْمَيْتَةَ » يُرَدِّدُهَا ثَلاَثَ مَرَّاتٍ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1500 - Whenever the Messenger of Allah (sw) prayed for rain (Salat al-Istisqa'), he would say:
Allahumma isqi ‘ibadaka wa baha’imaka wa unshur rahmataka wa ahyi biladaka al-maytah
"O’ Allah (swt), provide water to Your servants and Your animals, spread Your mercy, and revive Your dead land."
He would repeat this three times.
